name: midscene-computer
notes: Project-level source of truth for agent apps that can import MCP server definitions on the current macOS mainline.
Do not commit local/midscene-computer.env; each machine supplies its own VLM key.
The MCP server uses system screenshots and system mouse/keyboard/scroll actions only.
For Codex cron/local agent runs on macOS, use scripts/sync_agent_project_config.sh to register this server and pre-approve the bounded visual action tools.
Windows PowerShell launchers are retained as future/experimental helpers and are not part of the current Taobao collection mainline.
